name_cn:
New Arrival🆕Chane1 25C Pre-Fall
Drawstring Backpack Silver ♥
Purchased from counter for 46200rmb~
Super beautiful bag👒Chane1 latest drawstring backpack
Classic quilted pattern paired with delicate calfskin texture.
The look is grand and simple, instantly elevating your style,
The clever double-pocket design takes fashion to the next level💫
Carry it, and it's definitely a perfect addition to your outfit, a worthwhile purchase✔️
Hardware: Thick 24k plated vintage gold
Material: Exclusive Gaiera authentic calfskin
Size: 24.3*18*7.8 cm
